task_title: Push GitHub, configure Vercel DB, deploy, and run production E2E

task_contract.goal: Create GitHub repository, configure hosted database and Vercel deployment, then run production E2E.
assumptions: User-provided GitHub and Vercel tokens are temporary and will be revoked by user.

instructions_found: Use tokens only in process environment

risks_to_watch: Marketplace DB may require interactive approval or billing

patch_loop.reason: Make Prisma/Vercel environment commands reproducible without committing secrets.
patch_loop.result: Committed locally and synchronized to GitHub via API because git smart HTTP push was blocked from this environment.

patch_loop.reason: Server Actions are browser form transport, so deployment E2E needed ordinary HTTP endpoints with explicit status codes and response bodies.
patch_loop.result: Local production E2E and GitHub Actions production E2E passed.

patch_loop.reason: Exclude local env files from Vercel deployment uploads while keeping .env.example in GitHub for developer reference.
patch_loop.result: Final Vercel deploy no longer emitted the .env warning.

validation_loop.evidence: Exit code 0 after API route/auth-service refactor.
Next.js production build passed; routes include /api/login, /api/logout, /api/me, /api/register, /dashboard, /login, /register.
E2E_PASSED for GET pages, anonymous auth rejection, empty register rejection, register/login/logout POSTs, authenticated /api/me, protected dashboard, and XSS-safe rendering.
Deployment dpl_GbWJTnUNQtsknPsTHFQTpgwiVW4o READY; production alias https://login-mini-site-sdd-demo.vercel.app assigned.

validation_loop.command: curl.exe / npm run e2e against production from local machine
validation_loop.evidence: Connect timeout from this machine to login-mini-site-sdd-demo.vercel.app:443; Vercel inspect still reported production deployment READY and aliased.
Run 25483377829 completed with conclusion success against https://login-mini-site-sdd-demo.vercel.app.

self_review.requirement_coverage: Covered: GitHub repository, Vercel project, hosted Prisma Postgres database, session secret env, production deployment, and E2E verification.
self_review.scope_drift: No unrelated repositories or global skill files changed during app delivery.
self_review.security_privacy: Tokens were used only as process environment variables; .env.local, .vercel, node_modules, and build artifacts were excluded from GitHub sync and Vercel upload.
self_review.regression_risk: Low for the demo scope after typecheck/build/local E2E/GitHub Actions E2E passed.
self_review.evidence_quality: Strong, with local production E2E and external GitHub runner E2E. Local direct production curl remains blocked by network path, not app readiness.
open_issues: Current local network resolves or connects to *.vercel.app unreliably, so local production curl evidence is blocked; external GitHub Actions passed.

what_changed: Created and deployed a 4-page login mini site with database-backed auth.
Added curlable API endpoints for deterministic E2E.
Added production E2E workflow for external verification.
evidence_report.validation_summary: Typecheck, security check, production build, local production E2E, Vercel deployment, GitHub sync, and GitHub Actions production E2E passed. Local machine production curl was blocked by network timeout.
proven_facts: Final deployment id dpl_GbWJTnUNQtsknPsTHFQTpgwiVW4o is READY.
Production E2E GitHub Actions run 25483377829 concluded success.
assumptions: User will revoke temporary GitHub and Vercel tokens after review.
risks_or_gaps: No DELETE feature exists in this demo, so DELETE E2E is explicitly not_applicable.
Local network to vercel.app timed out, so external runner evidence was used for final production E2E.
evidence_report.next_step: User can inspect the live site, repository, and workflow run; revoke temporary tokens.
